SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CHRISTY A. KRILETICH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GLEN HARVEY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRILETICH, CHRISTY A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARVEY, GLEN $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
